name: Enhanced Oil Recovery (EOR) Credit

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must incur costs for a project in the U.S. involving tertiary recovery methods and provide a petroleum engineer's certification.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A 15% credit for allowable costs associated with qualified enhanced oil recovery projects, including tangible property, intangible drilling costs, and tertiary injectants.
